articles.description: Negative tactics and no shots on target - but somehow Liverpool's Champions League campaign is still just about alive after a 2-0 loss at PSG.
articles.title: PSG 2-0 Liverpool: Arne Slot says Reds 'in survival mode' after Champions League loss

articles.description: Atletico Madrid take a huge step towards reaching the Champions League semi-finals as they claim an impressive win at 10-man Barcelona.
articles.title: Barcelona 0-2 Atletico Madrid - Diego Simeone's side secure crucial Champions League quarter-final first-leg advantage

articles.description: A legal order seeking the golfer's medications - including dosage and warnings about driving on pill bottles - will be issued later this month, court record shows.
articles.title: Prosecutors seek Tiger Woods' medications records after Florida arrest

articles.description: Tyson Fury says he wants to face long-term rival Anthony Joshua after his heavyweight comeback against Arslanbek Makhmudov on Saturday.
articles.title: Fury vs Makhmudov: Briton says he want Anthony Joshua next

articles.description: Daniil Medvedev destroys a racquet as he suffers the first 6-0 6-0 loss of his career at the hands of Matteo Berrettini in Monte Carlo.
articles.title: Monte Carlo Masters: Daniil Medvedev destroys racquet in 6-0 6-0 loss to Matteo Berrettini

articles.description: Jos Buttler finds form at the IPL  before winning the match for Gujarat Titans with a final-ball run-out in a remarkable one-run victory over Delhi Capitals.
articles.title: IPL 2026: Jos Buttler finds form with fifty for Gujarat Titans against Delhi Capitals

articles.description: Eleven Premier League teams in Europe? It sounds preposterous, but it is not as far fetched as it seems.
articles.title: How 11 Premier League teams could qualify for Europe

articles.description: The Masters Par 3 contest is a unique tradition that features 90-year-old Gary Player holing birdie putts and nine-year-old Frankie Fleetwood focusing on hitting a green.
articles.title: The Masters 2026: Family fun and holes in one - why par 3 contest crosses generations

articles.description: Our Ask Me Anything team explain why many La Liga sides will be playing their next matches wearing retro kits.
articles.title: La Liga: Why are teams playing in retro shirts this weekend in Spain?

articles.description: Enzo Fernandez has given Chelsea boss Liam Rosenior the first major internal disciplinary issue of his brief tenure at Stamford Bridge - BBC Sport analyses the situation.
articles.title: Enzo Fernandez: Was dropping Chelsea midfielder a sign of Liam Rosenior's authority or a big risk?
